response: This is a classic Knuth‐Morris‐Pratt (KMP) substring search: first it builds the “longest‐proper‐prefix‐which‐is‐also‐suffix” (lps) table for the pattern in O(m) time, then it scans the text in O(n) time using that table to skip over already‐matched prefixes and returns the start index of the first match (or –1 if none is found).
